first10.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ عَلَ��ٰ عَبْدِهِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَلَمْ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عِوَجَاۜ
first10.english: All Praise (is) for Allah the One Who (has) revealed to His slave the Book and not (has) made in it any crookedness
first10.transliteration: al-ḥamdu lillahi alladhī anzala ʿalā ʿabdihi l-kitāba walam yajʿal lahu ʿiwajā

first10.arabic: قَيِّمًۭا لِّيُنذِرَ بَأْسًۭا شَدِيدًۭا مِّن لَّدُنْهُ وَيُبَشِّرَ ٱلْمُؤْمِنِينَ ٱلَّذِينَ يَعْمَلُونَ ٱلصَّـٰلِحَـٰتِ أَنَّ لَهُمْ أَجْرًا حَسَنًۭا
first10.english: Straight to warn (of) a punishment severe from near Him and give glad tidings (to) the believers those who do righteous deeds that for them (is) a good reward (is) a good reward
first10.transliteration: qayyiman liyundhira basan shadīdan min ladun'hu wayubashira l-mu'minīna alladhīna yaʿmalūna l-ṣāliḥāti anna lahum ajran ḥasanan

first10.arabic: وَيُنذِرَ ٱلَّذِينَ قَالُوا۟ ٱتَّخَذَ ٱللَّهُ وَلَدًۭا
first10.english: And to warn those who say Allah has taken Allah has taken a son
first10.transliteration: wayundhira alladhīna qālū ittakhadha l-lahu waladan

first10.arabic: مَّا لَهُم بِهِۦ مِنْ عِلْ��ٍۢ وَلَا لِـَٔابَآئِهِمْ ۚ كَبُرَتْ كَلِمَةًۭ تَخْرُجُ مِنْ أَفْوَٰهِهِمْ ۚ إِن يَقُولُونَ إِلَّا كَذِبًۭا
first10.english: Not they have about it any knowledge and not their forefathers Grave (is) the word (that) comes out of their mouths Not they say except a lie
first10.transliteration: mā lahum bihi min ʿil'min walā liābāihim kaburat kalimatan takhruju min afwāhihim in yaqūlūna illā kadhiban

first10.arabic: فَلَعَلَّكَ بَـٰخِعٌۭ نَّفْسَكَ عَلَىٰٓ ءَاثَـٰرِهِمْ إِن لَّمْ يُؤْمِنُوا۟ بِهَـٰذَا ٱلْحَدِيثِ أَسَفًا
first10.english: Then perhaps you would (be) the one who kills yourself over their footsteps if not they believe in this [the] narration (in) grief
first10.transliteration: falaʿallaka bākhiʿun nafsaka ʿalā āthārihim in lam yu'minū bihādhā l-ḥadīthi asafan

first10.arabic: إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا مَا عَلَى ٱلْأَرْضِ زِينَةًۭ لَّهَا لِنَبْلُوَهُمْ أَيُّهُمْ أَحْسَنُ عَمَلًۭا
first10.english: Indeed, We We have made what (is) on the earth adornment for it that We may test [them] which of them (is) best (in) deed
first10.transliteration: innā jaʿalnā mā ʿalā l-arḍi zīnatan lahā linabluwahum ayyuhum aḥsanu ʿamalan

first10.arabic: وَإِنَّا لَجَـٰعِلُونَ مَا عَلَيْهَا صَعِيدًۭا جُرُزًا
first10.english: And indeed, We (will) surely make what (is) on it soil barren
first10.transliteration: wa-innā lajāʿilūna mā ʿalayhā ṣaʿīdan juruzan

first10.arabic: أَمْ حَسِبْتَ أَنَّ أَصْحَـٰبَ ٱل��كَهْفِ وَٱلرَّقِيمِ كَانُوا۟ مِنْ ءَايَـٰتِنَا عَجَبًا
first10.english: Or have you thought that (the) companions (of) the cave and the inscription were among Our Signs a wonder
first10.transliteration: am ḥasib'ta anna aṣḥāba l-kahfi wal-raqīmi kānū min āyātinā ʿajaban

first10.arabic: إِذْ أَوَى ٱلْفِتْيَةُ إِلَى ٱلْكَهْفِ فَقَالُوا۟ رَبَّنَآ ءَاتِنَا مِن لَّدُنكَ رَحْمَةًۭ وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًۭا
first10.english: When retreated the youths to the cave and they said Our Lord Grant us from Yourself Mercy and facilitate for us [from] our affair (in the) right way
first10.transliteration: idh awā l-fit'yatu ilā l-kahfi faqālū rabbanā ātinā min ladunka raḥmatan wahayyi lanā min amrinā rashadan

last10.arabic: ٱلْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ ٱلَّذِىٓ أَنزَلَ عَلَىٰ عَبْدِهِ ٱلْكِتَـٰبَ وَلَمْ يَجْعَل لَّهُۥ عِوَجَاۜ

last10.transliteration: qayyiman liyundhira basan shadīdan min ladun'hu wayubashira l-mu'minīna alladhīna yaʿmalūna l-ṣāliḥāti anna lahum ajran ḥasanan
